element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Power gauge management - firing too rapidly depletes gauge and causes pauses between shots
Traditional Mario franchise enemy, foundational target practice
Core enemy type requiring sustained shooting accuracy
Extra life awarded at 60 coins collected; risk-reward mechanic
Enemies deplete health; management throughout level
Pacing pressure; failure condition if time expires
Lead to different enemies and prizes; converge at boss gate
Aquatic enemy variant requiring adapted targeting
Restores health; found in question mark blocks
Increases firepower; strategic collection during combat
Instant loss if fall with fewer than 3 coins; spatial awareness requirement
Iggy designs powerful mechs; unique pattern per Koopaling
Larger versions of standard enemies; increased health pools
Series antagonist; ultimate threat requiring all mastered skills

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching checkpoint areas before boss gates
typical_tension_triggers: Power gauge depletion from rapid fire (forced pause vulnerability)
Health bar depletion from enemy attacks
Approaching pit hazards with insufficient coins
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Steady escalation with discrete tension peaks at level bosses; time limit creates persistent background pressure; mechanical feedback (power gauge pauses) adds moment-to-moment tension management

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Branching paths within levels lead to different enemies and prizes; players can choose routes of varying difficulty/reward

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundational mechanics introduction with basic Goomba and Koopa enemies; power gauge management and time limits establish core tensions
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of varied enemy types (Cheep-Cheeps), multi-path navigation complexity, mid-tier boss encounters with Koopalings in mechs
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sustained pressure from accumulated enemy variety, increased Koopaling mech complexity, final convergence toward Bowser encounter
notable_spikes: First Koopaling mech boss (establishes pattern complexity)
Bowser final boss encounter (series antagonist, ultimate difficulty peak)
Level transitions with new enemy types (mid-game pacing shift)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level contains multiple paths offering different enemies and prizes, but all paths eventually converge on a single approach route leading to the boss gate
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic pattern applied across all 12 levels

notable_level_patterns.description: All levels enforce completion within an allotted time window, creating persistent pacing tension independent of enemy density
Each level terminates in a mandatory boss encounter (Koopaling, oversized enemy, or Bowser); boss defeat required to advance
Mushrooms and flowers found before bosses; stars usable primarily during boss battles; encourages forward exploration and resource management
